name: Image-Based Visual Servoing (IBVS) Tracking
description: A Machine Vision Engineer is prototyping an automated PTZ (Pan-Tilt-Zoom) camera system that must actively track moving targets. Implement an OpenCV-based visual servoing loop in CoppeliaSim using the ZMQ Remote API to maintain a programmatically created target sphere at the center of a Vision Sensor's view. The target must follow a continuous 3D trajectory (minimum 1.0m) for at least 100 simulation steps. Export a tracking log to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/tracking_log.csv with columns: step, time_s, target_world_x, target_world_y, target_world_z, cam_yaw_deg, cam_pitch_deg, centroid_x_px, centroid_y_px, error_magnitude_px, and bbox_area_px. Save a performance analysis to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/servoing_report.json including total_frames, avg_error_px, and max_error_px. Save 5 evenly spaced frames with visual tracking overlays (crosshair or bounding box) to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/frames/. Login: username=ga, password=password123.
